name: Randy Brecker
abstract: Randal Edward Brecker (born November 27, 1945) is an American trumpeter, flugelhornist, and composer. His versatility has made him a popular studio musician who has recorded with acts in jazz, rock, and R&B.

interviews.title: Randy Brecker interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, December 12, 2022

works.t: If you could see me now

about_quotes.speaker: Ada Rovatti
about_quotes.evidence: with Randy yes it’s my husband and I’m the wife, but clearly if I couldn’t — you know a lot of people assume oh if she’s in the Brecker Brothers and plays with him
about_quotes.doc_title: Ada Rovatti interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, December 13, 2022

about_quotes.speaker: Nick Mondello
about_quotes.evidence: Before the Covid I went to see Randy Brecker, who is a dear friend, over at the resurrected My Father’s Place.
about_quotes.doc_title: Nick Mondello interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, October 19, 2022

about_quotes.speaker: John Abercrombie
about_quotes.evidence: I met Michael and Randy Brecker and they recommended me for a band called Dreams... And then I got a phone call one morning from Jack DeJohnette... that was like a return to the Dreams band because it also had Michael and Randy.
about_quotes.doc_title: John Abercrombie interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clinton, New York, April 19, 2001

about_quotes.speaker: Dave Liebman
about_quotes.evidence: As to Randy, he was to me. Also because we were about three or four years apart too. ... It’s like, Randy was like a brother; Michael was like the younger brother.
about_quotes.doc_title: Dave Liebman — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Warren Bernhardt
about_quotes.evidence: I was in the original fusion band of all time it might have been, with Jeremy Steig and Randy Brecker and myself and Joe Beck.
about_quotes.doc_title: Warren Bernhardt interviewed by Monk Rowe, Bearsville, New York, January 3, 2012

about_quotes.speaker: Fred Wesley
about_quotes.evidence: he said that I influenced his playing... He told me that he would listen to my stuff and incorporate it into his stuff
about_quotes.doc_title: Fred Wesley interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, November 21, 2024
